segments.speaker: Officer
segments.text: What seems to be the problem?

segments.speaker: You
segments.text: I think I lost my wallet. I last had it near South Station.

segments.speaker: You
segments.text: My Korean ID, one debit card, some cash, and my student ID.

segments.speaker: Officer
segments.text: Do you know the approximate time you lost it?

segments.speaker: You
segments.text: Probably between 6 and 7 p.m. I noticed it was missing when I got home.

segments.speaker: Officer
segments.text: We can file a lost property report.

segments.speaker: You
segments.text: Thank you. I also want to know what to do if someone uses my card.

segments.speaker: Officer
segments.text: Call your bank immediately and freeze the card.

segments.speaker: You
segments.text: I already locked it through the app, but I'll call them too.

segments.speaker: Officer
segments.text: Good. Leave your contact information here.

segments.speaker: You
segments.text: Of course. If it turns up, could someone contact me by email?
